Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to compute total resolution time for each case Typically total resolution time is from the first event Receive Ticket to the last event Close Ticket So we will compute from Receive Ticket to Close Ticket

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lets list events with timestamps Case 101 from 0800 to 1015 Total time 2 hours 15 minutes Case 102 from 0805 March 1 to 0915 March 2 Total 25 hours 10 minutes Case 103 from 0810 to 0930 1 hour 20 minutes Case 104 from 0820 March 1 to 0830 March 2 24 hours 10 minutes Case 105 from 0825 March 1 to 0930 March 3 49 hours 5 minutes

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Clearly cases 102 104 and 105 are much longer than 101 and 103 The average resolution time is around 204 hours But cases 102 104 105 are above average Using IQR sorted times Q1 179 Q3 37125 IQR 35335 but visually 102 104 105 longer

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to examine each long case Case 102 long delays between assign and escalate 25 hours escalate to investigate 25 hours investigate to resolve 19 hours Case 104 between assign and investigate 35 hours investigate to resolve 19 hours Case 105 between escalate and investigate 28 hours investigate to resolve 19 hours Common patterns presence of escalations long waiting times long gap between investigation and resolution about 19 hours Late investigation in afternoon

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Escalation leads to longer processing because handoff to another team Long waiting times before investigation agent busy Investigation resolution gap after investigation delay in finalizing possibly approval or end of day Late investigation timing tickets not assigned early

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Compute more precisely times between key activities table for all cases confirming patterns Cases with escalation have long escalate to investigate All long cases have investigate to resolve 19 hours Short cases less than 1 hour

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Root causes Late assignment Escalation handoff delays Investigation resolution gap due to scheduling Bottlenecks at assignment escalation investigation to resolution

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: These factors increase cycle times Escalations cause queueing Delays before investigation idle time Investigation resolution gap lacks tight coupling exacerbated by late investigations

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Recommendations Reduce escalation rates Improve assignment efficiency Streamline post investigation process Address Level2 delays Investigate afternoon pattern
